name: @broberg/config
description: The fleet's single-source config helper — a Zod-based env parser that validates + types process.env at boot (fail-fast, listing every offending key), a defineConfig factory for typed business-constant objects, and coerceInt/coerceBool/productionGuard escape hatches. Enforces 'one source, trickle down' so no value is hardcoded across many files. Runs in Node, Bun and edge; zod is a peer dependency.
